chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-519 of 2024 Nizamuddin Versus Muhammad Irfan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.3130/24 2. For orders on Misc. No.3131/24 3. For orders on Misc. No.3132/24 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 12.02.2024 Mr. M. Sajjad Abbasi for petitioner. -.-.- Heard learned counsel and perused record. The Revisional Court in Revision Application No.203 of 2022 allowed application under section 12 CPC by directing the trial Court to record evidence and dispose of it in accordance with law. Nothing has been expressed by learned counsel for the petitioner that the jurisdiction so vested was not exercised or the one which was exercised was not vested in it. It was prerogative of revisional Court to hear the revision arising out of an order passed on application under section 12 CPC, and as deemed fit and proper, remanded the same to trial Court to dispose it off after recording evidence. No interference as such is required. Petition is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
